model_answer: Compilation checks syntax and type rules only. First add targeted tests, then trace variable states to find logic bugs.
Use .equals for text comparison; == checks whether two variables reference the same object.
Binary search requires sorted data. Without order, midpoint decisions are unreliable; sort first or use linear search.
Submitting AI code as your own can violate integrity rules. Cite assistance and follow AP/course policy.
Do not jump to full answers immediately. Use scaffolded hints and check misconceptions first.
Abstraction reduces complexity by hiding nonessential implementation details and showing key behavior.
